goal: Produce a concrete integration plan to merge the PDF-defined bianzhong music puzzle into the current game architecture, with explicit implementation milestones and risk/difficulty analysis.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay runtime code in this task; this is planning and arbitration only.
Respect current confirmed direction: battle active card taxonomy remains two types (立论/策术) and no hidden-card semantics.
Default UX language remains Chinese; multilingual should be surfaced via initial settings entry and not mixed by default.
If source conflicts exist between current implementation and PDF proposal, record arbitration before finalizing plan.
Keep recommendations grounded in existing files and architecture of StoryEngine/StoryScreen/MainMenu/LanguageContext.
deliverables: Conflict arbitration record for faction-route mismatch between current prolog and PDF bell design
Integration planning document with scope, architecture, flow, data contract, milestones, and acceptance criteria
Difficulty/risk section with mitigation and sequencing suggestions
